title: GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportion to medical appointments, shopping, social, or business trips, with medical being the priority. 615 E Cottonwood Lane Condon, OR 97823 Eligibility: Unrestricted; age 60 and older and people with disabilities are prioritized Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Transportation available Monday-Friday, and occasional weekends Email (541) 351-9545 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 351-9545 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call at least 36 hours in advance to set up appointments. Voicemails left after business hours Thursday will not be received until the next Monday. FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Gilliam County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5:00pm Services: Disability Related Transportation General Paratransit/Community Ride Programs Non-Emergency Medical Transportation Senior Ride Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION
